    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

    S

    searchRoute(Location, Location, List) - Method in class model.Problem
    Recursively searches for a valid path between two locations using Depth-First Search (DFS).
    secondLocation - Variable in class model.Route
     
    setCoordX(double) - Method in class model.Location
    Sets the X coordinate.
    setCoordY(double) - Method in class model.Location
    Sets the Y coordinate.
    setFirstLocation(Location) - Method in class model.Route
    Sets the starting location of the route.
    setGasPrice(int) - Method in class model.GasStation
    Sets the price of gas for this station.
    setId(int) - Method in class model.Location
    Sets the unique identifier for the location.
    setLength(long) - Method in class model.Road
    Sets the physical length of the road.
    setLocationType(LocationType) - Method in class model.Location
    Sets the type classification of the location.
    setName(String) - Method in class model.Location
    Sets the name of the location.
    setNumberOfTerminals(int) - Method in class model.Airport
    Sets the number of terminals at the airport.
    setPopulation(int) - Method in class model.City
    Sets the city's population.
    setRoad(Road) - Method in class model.Route
    Sets the road entity associated with this route.
    setRoadType(RoadType) - Method in class model.Road
    Sets the type classification of the road.
    setSecondLocation(Location) - Method in class model.Route
    Sets the destination location of the route.
    setSpeedLimit(int) - Method in class model.Road
    Sets the speed limit of the road.
    speedLimit - Variable in class model.Road
